name: suno-creator
description: Suno API client + projectM visualizer + cinematic QML karaoke video creator (Windows cross-compile stub)
comment: builtin-baseline is a placeholder — set to a real vcpkg commit SHA when first cross-compiling for Windows. On Arch Linux the system Qt6/pacman packages are used instead (see RULES.md §6 and .agent/SKILLS.md).
